name: Pilate
oracleText:
When Pilate enters the battlefield, choose one -
• Target opponent sacrifices a creature.
• Target opponent discards a card.
flavorText: "I am innocent of the blood of this just person." — Matthew 27:24
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide.
title: Washer of Hands
